title: HTTP API Resources, Representations, Errors, and Handler Layers · Failure Repair Bay
summary: A preserved Go feed-service run contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, normalization, fetch, SQL, transaction, lease, goroutine, handler, accessibility, migration, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in consistent feed-reader HTTP API and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence def…
objectives: Design tenant, source, subscription, entry, collection, search, and reader-state resources around client decisions rather than tables.
Separate routing, authority, request admission, application command, repository, representation, and observability with narrow interfaces.
Apply safe and idempotent method semantics, success statuses, preconditions, redirects, and retry guidance consistently.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Go Resource Model
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 2773 during a PostgreSQL claim and failover drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile resource semantics, layered handlers, problem details, cancellation, and response finality; every goroutine, body, row set, transaction, lease, timer, and pool needs named cleanup ownership; then change one artifact, deployment, incident, backup, restore, rollback, or capacity condition and reconcile the release. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Design tenant, source, subscription, entry, collection, search, and reader-state resources around client decisions rather than tables.

Inspect the Feed Go Resource Model trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Go Request Cancellation
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: feed-go-request-cancellation-1287sw" that uses case 3109 to reconcile resource semantics, layered handlers, problem details, cancellation, and response finality. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, parse through native XML libraries, contact publishers, access PostgreSQL, read host files, handle real signals, launch unbounded goroutines, or claim race, load, accessibility, container, backup, restore, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5, pgx 5.10.0, goose 3.27.2, PostgreSQL 18.4, original fixtures, controlled RoundTrippers and httptest servers, disposable databases, race and fuzz runs, subprocesses, inspected images, accessibility review, capacity, backup, restore, rollback, and release gates.
